description: D-pad discrete threshold is a flat 0.5. Stick oscillating at 0.49/0.51 produces rapid press/release flicker. Fix: activate at 0.6, deactivate at 0.4 (configurable). Tests: value goes 0.55→0.45→0.55 with hysteresis should NOT toggle. Value goes 0.65→0.35→0.65 SHOULD toggle.
title: D-pad threshold lacks hysteresis
